Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff Camille Perez, Etc.
Off Calendar Sep-07-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GAIL MCGOWAN's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff Camille Perez, Etc.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant's motion to compel responses to Special Interrogatories, Judicial Council Interrogatories, and Requests for Production of Documents, Sets One, is unopposed and granted. Plaintiff shall respond to said discovery pleadings, without objection within twenty days of service of a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Monetary sanctions are awarded in the sum of $1,245.00 as against plaintiff to be paid within the aforesaid twenty days.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
